evidence.clean_text: The employment of the Second Party under the present agreement in respect of all matters relating to working hours, sick leave, cases of absence, injury, disability, and death, and as regard termination of services and compensation due to the Second Party in the form of an end-of-service award, shall be governed by provisions of the Labour and Workman's Law in force in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
